definition: Adopted from the evolutionary theology of Pierre Teilhard de Chardin, 'Christogenesis' is the process by which the entire cosmos is evolving, growing, and converging toward a unified state of divine consciousness (the Omega Point or Christ). Dick saw the universe not as a static creation, but as a living fetus or a gestating organism. The 'Stealth Invasion' of VALIS is the mechanism of this Christogenesis: the divine plasmate is slowly infecting and transforming the dead, mechanical matter of the Black Iron Prison into the living, thinking body of the cosmic Christ.
